star_1.text: Ads are so disruptive and constant that it makes it unplayable. Every level is followed by an ad, some you can't skip, and the levels are short, so you just feel like it's an ad-watching app, not a game. Even claiming rewards requires watching ads, which isn't too big of a deal normally, but to decline the reward instead of watch, you have to WAIT for the "no thanks" option to appear slowly, which means you're just staring at the screen doing nothing until it does. It's so predatory! Not worth it

There are way too many ads in this game, you can't even open the chest you receive without an ad, and it is so annoying. Also, this game is so boring, because all you can do is the regular mode which is way too easy, and boring. You guys should add other modes, and other worlds. Lastly, the only customizations for the character that you can get is either an animal or a jelly, and the animal is way too expensive, so I tried to keep playing to get more gems, but ads kept popping up in my face.

This game would be great if it was playable, but it's was just a terrible experience. The game is just crammed full of ads in every corner. You have to wait like 5 very long seconds each level if you want to play the game, and your reward for completing a level is watching an ad that you have to wait for both the ad to be skippable, then a minigame for that ad afterward to be skippable. More of an ad watching simulator than a game. This would be way more fun if you were allowed to actually play.

another company to add to my "do not play" list. TO MANY ADS. After EVERY level, seriously? Even worse, they try to be sneaky with them! Dangling glowing chests with giant "Open" lettering. (the smaller texts reading, "watch ad to") Hoping for impuse clicks, forcing people to wait a few seconds until "no thanks" pops up. Playing this game felt like opening an infected computer. Shame on you.

Great concept for a game completely ruined by ads. Don't offer a free version of a game if you plan on turning it into a merciless ad generator, in the first minute of the game I ran into three unskippable ads smh. Either plan on buying the game or skip it, be for I even played anything the first thing that pops up is an offer for a vio subscription at 5 per week... Per week, that's $260 a year. For a phone game. Get out of here with that

The way of making your games is just bad. Ads every time you die or win a stage. And they in all their games make you click ads without the intention. For example sometimes or mostly when you want to claim your reward after a stage completion it says "claim reward 5x" but it directs to a ad. Why put that there instead of just claim without an ad. You have to wait some seconds to be able to claim your reward. And they do this in all their games and not only when claiming a reward.

I liked the gameplay, and I hoped that later levels would have some more complexity but I didn't make it that far because there's an ad after every single level, I thought "ok let's try get rid of these ads", I don't mind supporting Devs with a few quid. Whoever made this seemed to think removing ads is worth £6 a week! You gotta be joking? You get 'VIP access' but I didn't care about the other bits and all I wanted was to remove ads and that was the cost. Also the audio needs to be worked on.

The ads are malicious and appear after every level, which take about 10-15 seconds to beat. Some ads even crash the game. They are also asking for almost 6$ a week to get rid of them, along with a few other minor perks but honestly, the game isn't worth that much, however fun it may be. As for gameplay, it's cute and was fun for a few levels but, there's no real challenge to it. Change out to a single payment option and place an ad every 3rd-4th level, then I'll consider playing this game again.

The gameplay was enjoyable, but the amount of ads is just ridiculous. I'm not one to complains about ads, but in this case it's just terrible. I don't mind an occasional ad or one after like 3 or 4 rounds, but there's an ad after EVERY TIME YOU PLAY. It's really sad because the game is a cool idea, the graphics are good and while the controls don't always work well, it's overall a good game, but the ads make this unenjoyable and frustrating.

Boring and the game has an ad between every level. You play a level for 15 seconds and then you have a 15-30 second ad. They try to get you to start a 3 day trial of ad free and premium content but then it renews at $5.99 a week. Like what? An ad every single attempt, or premium for $6 a week. What a joke. It also asks for your rating on if you like the game after the first level. Hitting 1 star and submitting doesn't actually submit to the google reviews, they don't want this. Here's my 1 star.

Cute graphics/idea, but ads after EVERY level is ridiculous. Also, you're asked after EVERY level if you want to multiply your diamonds by watching yet another ad. Don't want to multiply? Watch another ad anyway! Want to open a chest for a rare shape? Watch an ad. There's no way to dismiss the chest either. You HAVE to watch the ad. I know that's how you get your money, but that's how you lose players as well. The game also asked me to rate after the very first level before spamming me with ads.

Stop with the incessant ads. literally 10 seconds into the game after downloading it and completing the first level -- there's an ad. Then there's an ad to open a chest. And guess what? Another ad after beating the next level. these levels (at least starting out) are only a couple seconds long. Seriously? 3 ads in a matter of maybe 3 minutes. When an ad lasts longer than the actual game, you know it's bad. Might as well be called ad simulator 2019.

My first review ever, and it doesn't look too good. First off, every time I play the game, even at level 1, I reach a certain speed that my entire phone CRASHES. Yes, CRASHES. Secondly, there are WAY TOO MANY ADS. Seriously, calm down with the revenue at least and focus on quality, not becoming EA. Third, it's literally too easy. I never got through the first level because of the first reason. Still, AT least make something fun. Hope this helps the game become better, not worse.

Jelly Shift is easily one of the blandest games I have ever played. The concept is good, it controls great, but there is absolutely no difficulty increase whatsoever. All the obstacles are the same and become repetitive, and the game becomes seriously boring very quickly. If Jelly Shift provides any sort of challenge or level progression, this would be a 5 star rating.

Disgusting. The game lasts at LEAST 3 seconds and at MOST 20 from levels 1-50. Ads after every single level. Let's do math here. 3 times 10 is thirty. Thirty second ads. X button doesn't work. Wait.. wait.. WAIT! Certain X buttons work at the 15 second mark, but another ad comes after. Either you can't X it out or you can. Either way it's 30 seconds and higher. BTW, the controls don't even work. The (no ads) Is a money waste. Ads pop up in game too which makes you lose! :O Do not download.

Way too many ads. I Can't even pass a level without it being choppy and heating up my phone. Which is pretty sad for a basic mobile game. I wouldn't had minded this if the game wasn't boring in itself. It would of been much more challenging to implement a horizontal swipe feature in to make the game fast paced. Also there is literally no way you can die unlike the ad where you restart whenever you hit the obstacle. No matter what I do I always win. Horrible game design.

After the second level I deleted the app. The amount of ads is ridiculous! After the first level your asked to rate the app, after the second level you have to watch an ad and then make you watch another ad to open a box. If you don't want to, you have to wait for the 'no thanks button' to appear. According to other reviews there's an ad after every level and you can't unbox anything without watching an ad. Seriously!?

it's okay, I do hate the fact that there are ad pop ups after every level of completion, and even when you get your level ups, and treasures. I uninstalled it quickly because I didnt want to wait for another ad to finish or for the next one that just keeps popping up no matter how many times you beat a level. Its extremely annoying, not enjoyable.

This game sucks. Everytime I try to play the game the character goes backwards and fallsdown if I don't press play in time and if I do press it in time the character will fall through before I get to the first bar. DO NOT GET THIS GAME IT IS HORRIBLE I mean what the heck. The ads are better then this. I liked it when I played on the ad (yaknow actually played) ugh Im just so angry with this game.

NO NO NO! I seriously couldn't play this app for more 5 minutes before uninstalling it! I can tolerate a few adds in games, i really can. BUT when you have a 15 to 20 second unskippable ad at rhe end of EVERY level.. just no. The ads themselves are longer than the actually level. Dont waste your tine with this one.

star_2.text: The game is not bad, its fun actually. The problem is how heavy handed they are with ads. In the first 5 minutes of gameplay, trying to see if its a game I want to support, I was exposed to at least 20 ads in various forms. If you make a mistake and crash, get ready to sit through an ad. If you finish a short level, get ready to see an ad. I support developers and enjoy paying to unlock features, but these guys just can not help themselves from jamming ads in to every available opportunity.

The game was fun at first but it soon got boring. You have to do the same thing over and over and over again. To get a new character also costs A LOT. I would've rated it three stars but the amount of ads is ridiculous. Once you finish one round, an ad is shown. Like every couple of minutes an ad is shown, and it gets annoying. Then they keep asking you if you want to watch an ad for more gems too and that also gets annoying. It was a fun game but I wouldn't recommend it.

This game is kinda boring to be honest, the levels are really easy because you can't even really die, the only way to die is to fall off which is easily avoidable. Another thing is that you can't really shape it that easily either, I don't know if it's just my phone but you can't shift the jelly in little movements, you have to move your finger quite far up to move it thinner and when you do manage to move it, it moves really thin so it's hard to get through the square objects.

It's a pretty good game in general, but you literally have to watch an ad for EVERYTHING. Whenever you start a level, whenever you finish a level, whenever you open a prize box, etc., It's always controlled by ads. Unless you want to spend money to get a no-ad experience, you are going to get annoyed very quickly. If they cut down the ads, I would give this game a decent review, but the ads are just plain annoying.

So, the game itself seems fine - I'd give it 4 stars.    The ads though just completely wreck any enjoyment for me.  I understand that it's a part of free games, it rewards the developer - but the levels are 10-15 seconds each, and there's not only an ad after every level, but often a treasure box that is placed right where the "continue" button usually is when you complete a level which is super sneaky.  If you choose to open the box (often accidentally), you are locked into a 30sec ad.  If you don't want to click it, the "No thanks" option takes about 5 seconds to appear, really slowing down immersion.  It's a really lazy way to monetize your game imho.

Too many ads! I understand its a free game and the developers need to make money, so typically I never complain about ads in games. But I played 3 levels and had to watch 4 ads, not to mention the ads covering the screen before you start a new level. What little game I could stomach playing was good (thus 2 instead of 1 star), but when you have to watch about 45 seconds of ads for about 20 seconds of game, it sucks the fun right out of the experience.

Well, the ad made it look fun to play when in reality it's boring. I enjoy downloading random games then playing them, to give the game a chance on whether it's actually fun or the reviews on the certain app is correct. I wouldn't say it's a bad game, everyone has played a worser game than this. I downloaded it, loaded it up, then played the first level, everything went fine- Until I got to the second level and completed it. I had to sit through an ad (Usually you can skip the ad)

I really like this game, it's very fun, but there's some problems that need fixing. When I get a prize chest I press "watch ad to open" but it doesn't give me the ad or the prize and it just goes back to the game. And sometimes when I collect a fruit and win the level, it just restarts the same level and the same fruit. And the ads after every level are really annoying. Please fix this so I can enjoy this game again!

This game was fun for an hour. After that, it starts to get REAL boring. You can't really die, so its not very exciting. After you have unlocked all the skins, there is nothing else to do, because every level is pretty much the same. You cant replay any of the levels if you don't do well, and it doesn't matter whether you do well or not, because you pass the level anyway. Another thing is that it is SOOOOOO easy. Anytime you get 3 blocks in a row, you get "fever" witch just completes the level.

It was ok for a while. If you get through the 1st half of the obstacles without error, you go into an invincible mode for the rest of the course. The challenge is just not there. I've only been playing for about 20mins and I've acquired all of the skins available. There's nothing more to see since "challenges" isn't ready yet apparently. I'm usually never one to complain about ads, but an ad after every single level is excessive, especially since the levels aren't that long. Uninstalled.

The game was interesting for one level. I expected the gameplay to evolve and become challenging but it never did. It's barely a game. It's an ad-watching app with one short easy game level between each ad. 2 stars mostly for the potential the mechanic lends itself to, 3 empty stars for not coming even close to exploring it and 90% of the experience being ads.

The amount of ads in this game is completely ridiculous. Every time you finish a level, every time you claim a reward. The game makes you feel like the only way forward is to watch the ad because the "no thanks" option only appears a short period later. The game is very average, without them bombarding me with ads, it might have got 3 stars.

The game is okay, but there were quite a lot of downsides. 1) I know it sounds like the typical 2-3 star comment, but it was ad overloaded. Waayy too many ads. After you finish a level, boom there's a 30 second as that you can't skip. I swear I didn't click any of the buttons with ads. 2) It gets quite boring after a few levels, I'm not trying to be harsh on this game, when I first played it, I really enjoyed it. Just to improve it, reduce the ads, and make a variety in the levels. Thanks!

It's a cute game but in the roughly 5 minutes I played it after installing, I got 5 ads. Every time I completed a level there was an ad, and when I got a reward (the cat cosmetic) I had to sit through an ad to get it as well. Normally I have no problem with ads but when they are so frequent and concentrated, what is the point--I have spent the same amount of time on ads if not more than actual gameplay.

Simple game concept executed poorly in my opinion. After I had completed 129 levels, I confirmed that there was no difficulty increase which makes for a very boring experience. Maybe have it send the jelly back to the beginning if it hits any obstacle instead of breaking through. And also just get rid of the fever thing because I want to actually PLAY the game. The levels could be a bit longer too. I'm giving it 2 stars because overall it isn't great but still has potential :)

This game is really fun!! Except that after VERY single round that you do you have to watch a 30 to 45 second ad. It is terrible.I understand if you have to watch an ad to get 3 gold coins but its crazy that you have to watch one every single time you finish a round. I am uninstalling the app because of the ads.

It's a fun game however, there is an ad after every single level. Furthermore, if it asks you if you want to watch an ad for more gems or coins and you press no thanks, it gives you an ad anyway...just one that you don't get anything out of. They're just too intrusive to enjoy this game without paying to remove them.

Garbage game, you literally spend more time watching ads than playing the game. Game concept is interesting and gameplay is fine, but gets boring after the 3rd level and the incessant ads make the whole thing intolerable. These cheap, boring, garbage adfarm games are becoming more and more common.

it's not terrible but it doesn't have much consistency other then, shape the jelly ooh you caught the ice cream or some other bs treat. Also every level ends with an ad? like it's a good time passer ig but I'm watching ads more then playing it and the levels aren't even hard or anything. isn't really worth installing

was fun at first but soon relaised that it was kinda boreing. the reason I say that is because you cant die!!! also the game isnt very well optimised so its kinda skippy witch is kinda annoying. but non-the-less the game would be better if the developers implamented some sort of challenge to the game. besically what im saying is....if you hit the barriers you should die and restart. maybey slow the speed and make the levels shorter. also it wouldent hurt to make the backround was more intresting

star_3.text: Not what I was expecting from this dev, but this game is actually alright. But the ads. Two ads on the home screen and an ad after every level when each lasts about 20 seconds? Surely you already make enough money already. The game feels a bit too easy but that's not a concern. Just let me play the game in peace, seriously. EDIT: Also forgot to mention how the prize machine is rigged.

Far too many ads but that can be solved by simply turning off your wi-fi. The main problem is that the game is too boring. At first I really liked the game but the levels are all the same, they're not challenging, they don't get any harder ; just make the character wide and flat and you'll win every level. Overall the game is okay and has potential but please improve it.

Eh, it's okay. All the levels are basically the same but they're nothing like the ads I've seen for this game. I haven't encountered anything really challenging in the all of the levels I completed, and I sure haven't seen any triangular shaped or moving barriers like the ad showed. Overall it's kind of fun but don't expect too much variation in the levels, or anything that the ads show. Some of the jellies you can unlock are pretty cute, though!

I saw this game in an ad and so I downloaded it. I like the game because it has good graphics, gameplay and everything a good game has. the only two things I dont like is that you get quite bored from doing the same thing over, getting gems and catching items. the other thing which is annoying are the ADS, you get an ad for every level you complete and the levels are short. but other than that good game.

The game is fun to play, the levels are captivating and the game seems like it is a good time killer. However, the game feels a bit more like an ad revenue farm than anything, as you get an ad after each and every level. Plus, the app always offers watching a SECOND ad to multiply your prize (however, it multiplies it by 5, so there is that.). Uninstalled, will install again if the ads are toned down, it's VERY obnoxious getting one after every. Single. Level.

Jelly Shift is a game where you shift the jelly to fit into a mold, of sorts. But you already know that. The controls are fine, nothing incredible. And the design is simple, very few ads (For me, at least). Very simple concept as well. But the levels don't get harder.. Okay, maybe there's a different square size one time, but that's it! If I didn't need to see what the molds were, I could do it in my sleep. What I'm trying to say is that it's a fine but boring game.

The game is enjoyable. but it has too many ads and levels are too easy. if you didn't shape your jelly at the right time. you hit the obstacle but you don't die. That was boring and you die if you fall. I suggest that if you hit the obstacle, You die. and Make further levels difficult. other than that. I liked it. it needs improvement tho

ok so the game itself is a great time waster as many mobile games are. but the controls are not that amazing. i constantly found it hard to get the jelly into the correct shape always off by a bit, while this could be my fault and all, the controls sometimes would just not register my swipes. also while i realize the creators get money like this, the ads felt a bit too in your face at times, especially with how short levels are, making ads even more annoying. i would write more but i cant.

I don't normally write reviews and I don't normally get annoyed by ads but here we are. The amount of ads in this game is unreal, after every level you get a 30 second ad that you just can't skip in anyway, sometimes at the end of levels you can watch an ad to upgrade something but if you hit no to keep playing you end up with an ad anyway. It is so irritating and really ruins the game

WAY TOO EASY! It's a great concept and everything but the game is way too easy. They have the same obstacles in each round and it's so repetative that u lose interest. I really don't like the "fever" u get after u pass a certain amount of obstacles. It takes u through the entire level without barely playing. If each level was longer, then "fever" would be nice but the levels are so short and easy u really don't need it. Good concept and great graphics, though.⭐⭐⭐

I saw the game in an add. It looked really fun until I tried it. The levels are pretty slow and its all the same. The scroll bar is kind of hard to control too. Also, there are SO MANY ADS. Its crazy. The ads are unbelievable. When you die, if you choose not to go on (without the ad) it gives you an ad afterwards (without the reward).

this is a good game, woth lots of potential. my only complaints are that there is no music, and that the levels get no harder as you progress. this makes the game boring. if the levels become harder, that way the game feels more rewarding and it is more addictive and fun. Good game though!

This is a very effective and addictive advertisement conveyor belt. It's fun to unlock all the different cosmetics by watching ads and the game is flashy enough to keep you playing but the game never increases in difficulty, the levels are unsatisfyingly short and pointlessly boring though at the same time very addictive. I ended up ulocking all the cosmetics then disabled ads (by turning off data) and kept playing up til level 100 which is indistinguishable from level 1. Monotonous. Don't play.

To be honest this game is really boring. You can't even die and the levels are really annoying because they are so easy. Chasing the fever doesn't make it interesting at all. Changing the jelly into a different shape is also hard becusse you have to more your finger higher or lower quite far and it's not easy. Like the idea was cute but make it alot more interesting, defo make the levels alot tricky and make sure you can die in some way.

At first the game was fun, then it's scammed me and made me watch 3 ads for a new character skin and didn't give it to me after I watched all 3. I was informed that you were only supposed to watch one ad to get a character. If it either scammed me or glitched I suggest that you should get your game fixed before it gets worse. Hopefully this review helps to get this game fixed before it becomes a common problem. but overall this game is very fun and amusing. I know you will do better next time🙂.

I saw a review saying "not many ads", got served ads after every level. Oh, you died, want to watch an ad and continue? No? Well watch an ad anyway. Whats that? Want to skip the ad after 5 seconds? Tough. TL;DR: More ads than enjoyable gameplay.

Its not a bad game, i had a little bit of fun playing it, i played till level 20 and your just doing the same thing over and over again, there is a quite a bit of adds to. Almost every time you fail or pass a level you get an add. I like how you can get different skins in the game to. Overall its an ok game, not good but not bad.

The game is fun. But they have ads after every single round. Then after the ad, they offer a boost if you watch another longer ad, and they don't let you click no until after a few seconds have passed. I get it, you want money. I feel that. But don't destroy the user experience for it.

I finished this game in one day. it is very simple and only has a few features. other than that there were so many adds and it was very annoying. this company in general has many adds on all of there games so it didn't surprise me. Other than that is had good gameplay and was good while it lasted.

is good game, but the ads shows up every little thing. For example, play one level you get ads, get boost your rewards (have to wait until it gives you the option to "no thanks") you get ads, etc... I know that this is a free game, but it is very annoying to get ads every single second.

star_4.text: I like this game very much but the only thing wrong with it is that the levels don't get harder. I would also like of there was an update including more catologs of skins. One more thing is that I would like it if every time a holiday is coming they did an update based on that holiday. For example, it was Halloween yesterday and they could have added some spooky skins and changed the map. Other than that, I enjoy this game very much and truly recommend it. Thank you for reading my review.

It's fun and addicting. The characters are cute and the controls are difficult at first, but easy to master. My only problem with this game is ads. Wanna open a chest? It's free! Oh, and you have to watch an ad. Really? Come on, just GET RID OF THE NON OPTIONAL ADS PLEASE. It would make the entire game so much better. The optional ads are fine because you have a choice. Overall, the game is worthy of a four star rating. I would recommend that you play this on airplane mode.

I would rate this game three stars but it is the BEST game ever! It's very cute and really fun, i play it almost every night before i go to bed but other than the good things i've had to say about this AMAZING game, i have 1 negative comment about it. The glitching. Idk why others are saying that when they're on normal mode, it glitches but for me, it totally glitches when i started to purchase the animal jelly's with 1,000 gems. I had 3,000 and some gems and i lost a lot of gems! Please fix it!!

It's good. The levels never get any harder, the characters are the opposite of cute, and there's no interesting features. It's just a repetitive run through of the same levels for gems that really go nowhere for you. I can't say I like this game, but I gave it four stars because it's well made and has no flaws in it's design other than the overwhelming lack of fun while playing. When I've got nothing to do I'll open this up and play a few rounds before getting bored of it and moving on.

I like this game but i think we all have had better games. I feel like once you get all characters the game is kinda over so maybe you could add challenges or mini games with the jelly. Im looking at the reviews and they say there is a lot of ads but no.1 thats how you make money. No.2 It hasnt been a problem for me so can you add mini games and/or challenges?? I feel it would make my experience 5 star and not just me ;)😷😷fun to play during covid 19 too!!Stay safe ❤️♥💛💚💙💜

Jelly shift is a pretty good game. Yes to tell the truth it can get boring sometimes but it also can be super fun. The controls are really easy, and this game is pretty challanging (not that much tho). I feel it would be beter with different levels and less ads. but over all 4 stars i think is pretty good.

it's really fun I really enjoy it and it's quite satisfying watching their jelly move up and down but the only downfall is that it is flooded with as every time you play A level is always comes up with ads after the level I hope the developers get this message I rated it I fall because I think overall the game is really good I just think they need to get rid of the ads and I read some of the reviews and I also think they should get rid of the money because there's no need to pay £10 or dollars

The game is extremely fun and addicting, the gameplay is very simply but still somehow quite intriguing. I never thought a game so simple and maybe even silly considered by some could be so entertaining and enjoyable to play. However, it would be nice if you made more skins because I have 32,000+ gems I don't know what to do with. I have been playing nonstop from about two days and have made a lot of progress, I haven't made any in app purchases and I really think you should try it out.

The overall game is good,its the sensitivity that's not that good.You can go from really flat to very tall in just a movement. Othertwise i love the costume aspect, the way it gives you a chance to get extra gems in gem rush is very unique and it's great to pass the time. Overall it's a really good game and you should definately give it a go when you can.

i love the game! its amazing and very addicting, but the reason i gave it 4 stars is that after you collect every character that you can buy with the gems in game you collect a lot of diamonds and don't have anything to do with them. I wold loveeee to see some more gem-spending things because that would make the game WAY more addicting and amazing.

Fun gameplay, and not too many ads overall. Ever since the big VIP and Worlds update, though, I feel like the membership is WAY too overpriced and that the trial is also quite short. I'm also not too fond of the new redesigns of the original Jellies. I personally don't like playing as a jelly with a face or anything; I liked the original plain colours better for their simplicity and because they didn't have any things like goggles or ears, the hitboxes were easier to understand. Fun game though!

This game is great to wind down before bed as it's nice and simple. I love how colourful the game is and the graphics are great too. I do think that with how short the levels are, the fever thing ruins it a bit. I feel like fever should be an option, so when you fill the fever bar up, you have to click a button to activate it. The fever thing is the only thing I have a problem with, other than that this is a great game and it's really enjoyable.

this game was so much fun!!!! the only thing was that there were lots of ads. you win, hit no thanks, then get an ad, you lose, you guessed it! an ad! Maybe you could try to put less adds please. : ) great game though!!!

Ok this game is good,but I finished all the levels and I have to do them all over again if I wanna play this game again,also please make more skins,this app gives me satisfaction all threw ,nevertheless I give it four stars here is why,Its fun and the levels are kinda hard which I think is good so kids have more playtime,The skins are cure and the shapes are nice,but some of the shapes make it hard,but there cute and the colors are nice,Thank you for making this game it's very nice and fun!!!😁

this game is pretty good, and definitely has a lot of potential. you can see that this game is in its early stages of development/missing a lot of things, which is fine and all but the current game here stale after awhile. its a fun game to play when your just sitting around, and is pretty much fine as it is, but I can tell there's a lot more in store.

The game itself is very repetitive, i stopped playing around level 16. the graphics are very nice for a simple game like this, its clear effort was made in the modeling aspect. The controls are simple, drag up or down, niylt much to really saw here.

I don't know if anyone even reads these, but this game was pretty good. Only problem was it gets really repetitive with the gem rushes. I read a few of the other reviews and I wanna say just turn the wifi off or airplane mode on. Or both if your like me and your tablet only turns wifi off if u turn on airplane mode.

I think the game is awesome! I love how you can shift the jelly into a bunch of shapes so they fit through the squares triangles and rectangles! It is very time consuming and really fun! I think the only thing is that there is lots of ads but that happens in a lot of games so keep up the good work and I will keep loving this game!

Great game. But too many ads. You automatically get an ad after your done playing, then you have to play another ad just to get another skin, or double your reward right after. Literally happened after. Every. Single. Round. It's too ridiculous and annoying. I don't have enough patience for that.

Great game, very addictive but too many ads. I am aware that this is how money is made when developing games/apps, but one has to remember that one does not want to lose the feel of a game because of such a large Advertisement intrusion. Please reduce the number of ads between levels.

star_5.text: because it's really fun to move it in the shape but when you don't get it in time you don't die you just go backwards
Very fun and easy to play with kids

So cool. Much fun than any other game in the whole wide world. U can have billion trillions of fun, get new characters and shape a jellyshift in different shapes bit try to be careful not to crash on the red bars . Whoever wants to play this can learn shapes or kind of love the game by just unlock stuff and try to get the food that runs away from you all the way to the finish line. You can get the purple diamonds too that are very important to get &t try to get all of the diamonds

This game is amazing! Very addicting, and relaxing! (for me at least) A few things maybe you could change: have a setting where you could turn off the vibration when you collect coins or go through hoops, (maybe that is an option but I dont know) Have more interesting loops and shapes to go through instead of basic long and short tall and thin designs. and another thing..it has a lot of adds, and I dont think you should have to watch an add to open a chest. Other then that, AMAZING GAME!!!!!

This game is the light in a dark mobile gaming world. Most mobile games today sell a quick cash grab, a stupid, not well integrated, gimmick, and awful graphics. I downloaded this game expecting something similar. What I got genuinely surprised me! The game has simple, yet cute, art style and better graphics than many other games it also involves multiple interesting features beside the main game! I would absolutely recommend it. :)

Its a really good app, really fun and entertaining. There are loads of ads but if you TURN OFF WIFI it's really good. I've had it for a day now and I've found no glitches what so ever so it's really good and not like other apps. Lot of 1 or 2 star reviews only complain about the ads but they obviously don't know what no WiFi is. Good app, will recommend to anyone who asks for a good game.

This game. Is a great way to calm down as it let's your body speek for itself the reason why I have rated it 5 stars is that I have had no problems or experiences with glitches the only bad thing is that you get some adverts across the game but I exceptionally love the idea of having to try and decide which way you want the jelly to shape I hope you enjoy it as well as I do.

Very nice game overall great game play and super fun I also had my son try it and I found him playing it when he was supposed to be sleeping! Also the adds are a bit annoying so if you don't really appreciate adds then this app may not be for you however it does have an option to close ad pop ups completely and I personally think that it would be better to use it just with the adds instead of having to pay

This game is a great way to waste your time. There are ads but who doesn't watching the same thing over and over every min as it is interupting your game time. The game is fun and creates a good cure for boredom. I think over all its a good free game.
